news.t: Dimensional Lists Four New International Equity ETFs

holdings.infoBox: DFIS is an equity ETF with a total of 3490 individual holdings. The top holdings are Telecom Italia stock at 0.55%, VAT Group AG at 0.45%, Hudbay Minerals at 0.44%, BAWAG Group AG at 0.43%, and Shibaura Mechatronics at 0.37%.

overview.description: The Dimensional International Small Cap ETF (DFIS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund actively invests in a broad and diverse portfolio of small-cap companies in developed markets outside the US, selected and weighted by market capitalization, in aim of long-term capital appreciation. DFIS was launched on Mar 23, 2022 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: Dimensional Lists Four New International Equity ETFs
data.text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dimensional Fund Advisors, a global leader in systematic multifactor investing, expanded its exchange-traded funds (ETFs) offering with today's listing of four new inte...
